meta.name: Feedback to Feature Bridge
meta.description: Identify feedback items that can be directly linked to roadmap features, score the connection strength, and notify the PM when strong links are found.

parameters.content:
## 37 — Feedback to Feature Bridge

**Required:**
- FEEDBACK_SHEET_ID: feedback with columns id, text, source, segment
- ROADMAP_SHEET_ID: roadmap items with columns id, title, description, status
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Wednesday at 14:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Find connections between customer feedback and roadmap features. Only link when there is clear, specific overlap. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 🔗 Feedback-Roadmap Bridges {{ $json.date }}: {{ $json.strong_links }} strong links / {{ $json.total_links }} total
